calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-27-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Petitioner Sabrina Diane Riffel was sworn and examined. The Court grants petitioner's name changed to Sabrine Diane O'Kennon. Decree signed.
